site.title: Yi Nian Tong Xuan - I Ching Hexagram Divination
site.description: Yi Nian Tong Xuan: consult the way of Heaven and Earth with three coins. I Ching online divination with Najia charting, hexagram & line texts, and divination records.

home.title: Yi Nian Tong Xuan
home.heroSub: Consult the Way of Heaven and Earth with Three Coins
home.heroDesc: Following the 64 hexagram system of the I Ching, cast coins to form hexagrams, observe images and interpret texts. Sincerity brings clarity; doubt invites questions.

coins.title: Three-Coin Casting
coins.desc: Simulate tossing three coins six times to generate hexagram lines, including original and changing hexagrams

history.title: Divination Records
history.desc: Automatically save each divination and review historical hexagrams and interpretations anytime

network.title: Six-Degree Network
network.desc: Visualize divination connections between users and explore kindred spirits

divination.title: Yi Nian Tong Xuan · Najia Liuyao
divination.subtitle: Jing Fang Najia Method · Three-Coin Casting · Six Relatives & Six Beasts
